name: TC5 — Failed Transaction — INSUFFICIENT_FUNDS
description: Verifies that a FAILED transaction from the PG is stored correctly with failure details and recon_status PENDING. RMS stores all transactions regardless of gateway status — the reconciliation engine processes them separately.
descriptionHtml: Verifies that a FAILED transaction from the PG is stored correctly with failure details and recon_status PENDING. RMS stores all transactions regardless of gateway status — the reconciliation engine processes them separately.
